docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY YUMANG, WILLY AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUMANG, WILLY AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, ANDREW
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PADILLA, ANDREW

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-10-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY VIC IGNACIO. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY KATHRYN RAMOS--HR DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
